title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING - 211info
text: PHOENIX COUNSELING CENTER INC MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual, group, couples/relationship, and family mental health counseling. 149 S Main Street Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm Email (541) 535-4133 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 535-4133 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an intake and schedule assessment appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance, sliding scale available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee. AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On Main Street/Highway 99 just past the 1st Street intersection on the left side, just before the one-way turns back into two ways. Rogue Valley Transit District bus stop nearby. Services: Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CO-OCCURRING CONDITIONS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE COUNSELING AND DUII EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PHOENIX COUNSELING CENTER INC
